overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a transition from an indoor medieval study room to the outdoor Great Lawn at night. The player exits a castle building through a stone archway and walks across a grassy field and along a cobblestone path toward the illuminated castle buildings under a cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval study room with desk and wall tapestries

events.description: NPC character picks up and examines a glowing pink object from the desk
camera begins moving steadily toward the wooden exit door

agents.ego_description: moving around the room observing the medieval furnishings and the NPC

notable_agents.action: standing by the desk examining a glowing pink magical object

entered.detail: large wooden desk with an open chest containing glowing items
tall standing lamp with a glowing purple glass globe
large decorative tapestries hanging on the stone walls
arched wooden door with iron hinges at the far end of the room
portrait paintings in ornate frames on the wooden panel walls
upholstered red armchair near the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside a warmly lit medieval study room with wooden paneling and stone walls. An NPC stands by a desk examining a magical object while the camera pans around the room, showing tapestries, paintings, and antique furniture before moving toward the exit door.

events.description: exiting the building through the wooden door into the stone archway
transitioning from warm indoor lighting to cool outdoor moonlight

agents.ego_description: passing through the doorway and stone archway to exit the building

entered.detail: gothic stone archway forming the exit passage
stone exterior wall covered in climbing ivy and vines
dark cloudy night sky becoming visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: Moving through the narrow stone archway exit, transitioning from the warm interior to the cool night air. The stone walls are covered in ivy as the camera passes through the doorway, with the night sky becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy lawn with distant castle view

events.description: text 'The Great Lawn' appears on screen identifying the location
slight turn toward the cobblestone path while crossing the grass

agents.ego_description: walking across the grassy field toward the illuminated castle in the distance

entered.detail: expansive grass field with small white flowers
large gothic castle buildings with illuminated windows on the hillside
snow-capped mountains visible behind the castle
ruined stone archways and walls covered in vegetation
dense line of trees marking the edge of the lawn

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the wide open Great Lawn under a cloudy night sky. The camera walks across the grassy field with the massive illuminated castle and snow-capped mountains visible in the distance, passing stone ruins on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone path leading to castle entrance

events.description: moving from grass onto the cobblestone pathway
passing under ornate lamp posts casting warm light on the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the illuminated cobblestone path toward the castle entrance

entered.detail: wet cobblestone path reflecting the lamp light
black iron lamp posts with glowing warm light
neatly trimmed green hedges lining the path
the main castle building drawing closer with detailed architecture
stone wall and railing along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the cobblestone path toward the castle entrance, passing ornate lamp posts and trimmed hedges. The castle buildings loom larger as the camera approaches, with warm light spilling from the windows onto the wet cobblestones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm intimacy of a medieval study into the expansive, cool atmosphere of a castle's moonlit grounds. It begins by panning through a room of wooden paneling and antique furniture, circling an NPC at a desk before gliding toward the exit. As the camera passes through a narrow stone archway draped in ivy, the warm interior light gives way to the crisp air of a cloudy night. The scene then opens onto the wide Great Lawn, moving past stone ruins across a grassy field with illuminated castle spires and snow-capped mountains looming in the distance. Finally, the camera follows a cobblestone path lined with ornate lamp posts and trimmed hedges, approaching the massive castle buildings as golden light spills from the windows onto the wet ground.
